findings.claim: CocoIndex daemon startup detaches from the calling process group, so caller terminal death does not imply daemon death.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep daemon detach but do not rely on parent shell/process-group lifetime for rerank sidecar cleanup.

findings.claim: CocoIndex MCP auto-ensures the rerank sidecar before server startup and defaults rerank-via-sidecar on.
findings.recommendedAction: Place pre-flight reap before Python ensure reuse/spawn so default-on MCP starts clean stale workers.

findings.claim: The Python launcher detaches the rerank sidecar with start_new_session=True and writes a sidecar PID ledger row.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep detach and add owner registration plus pre-flight reap.

findings.claim: The JS launcher detaches and unreferences the rerank sidecar, then writes a sidecar PID ledger row.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep detached warm-model reuse and add JS owner identity registration plus pre-flight reap.

findings.claim: The start script execs one uvicorn worker for the sidecar app, so each stale process can retain a model cache.
findings.recommendedAction: Keep workers=1 and ensure every stale worker has an automatic exit path.

findings.claim: The ledger schema records sidecar process data and owner token but no owner PID identity list.
findings.recommendedAction: Extend ledger rows with versioned owners array containing pid, createTimestamp, comm, registeredAtIso, lastSeenIso, and source.

findings.claim: Python reclaim_stale removes ledger rows only when the sidecar PID is already dead.
findings.recommendedAction: Add a process reaper predicate based on all owners dead plus health/config state, not only dead sidecar PID cleanup.

findings.claim: JS reuse cleanup keeps alive sidecar rows and drops only rows whose sidecar PID is dead.
findings.recommendedAction: Run JS pre-flight reap before findReusableSidecar returns or spawn starts.

findings.claim: Python reuse classification checks sidecar PID, owner token, config hash, and health, but no owner-death predicate.
findings.recommendedAction: Mirror JS pre-flight reap and owner pruning in Python.

findings.claim: The FastAPI sidecar has shutdown cleanup but no owner heartbeat or idle self-exit.
findings.recommendedAction: Add lifespan-managed background reaper task plus idle/in-flight accounting.

findings.claim: Health returns owner token hash and config hash for reuse matching, but no owner liveness, idle, or in-flight state.
findings.recommendedAction: Extend health or telemetry with reaper state without making health polls reset idle.

findings.claim: Python shifts to a new port when the configured port is healthy but not reusable, which can allow stale sidecars to survive while another sidecar starts.
findings.recommendedAction: Run pre-flight reap and migration before choosing a fallback port.
